email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Digital Performance Marketer bij Ants. Uw focus op data-gedreven marketing en echte impact spreekt me enorm aan.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte content en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast werk ik aan mijn eigen project mirook.com, waar ik gestructureerde data, entity-optimalisatie en GEO-audits toepas om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Ik ben vertrouwd met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Ants is de combinatie van mentorship en eigenaarschap. Ik wil groeien in performance marketing en mijn technische basis versterken met strategische diepgang. Uw 'boots-in-the-dirt'-mentaliteit past bij mij: ik pak zaken aan en lever resultaten.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Digital Performance Marketer position at Ants. Your focus on data-driven marketing and real impact strongly appeals to me.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, I work on my own project mirook.com, where I apply structured data, entity optimization, and GEO audits to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. I am familiar with tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console.

What attracts me to Ants is the combination of mentorship and ownership. I want to grow in performance marketing and strengthen my technical foundation with strategic depth. Your 'boots-in-the-dirt' mindset matches me: I take action and deliver results.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

I would be happy to discuss my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Ants-team,

Toen ik de vacature voor Digital Performance Marketer las, voelde het alsof jullie het over mij hadden. Jullie zoeken iemand met een eerste ervaring in performance marketing, een data-native mindset en een 'boots-in-the-dirt'-mentaliteit — dat ben ik.

Bij Episto werk ik dagelijks aan on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte content en WordPress-beheer. Ik analyseer prestaties met SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console, en vertaal data naar acties. Mijn project mirook.com is een speeltuin voor technische SEO en GEO: ik implementeerde JSON-LD schema, entity-markup en llms.txt om zichtbaarheid in AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Dit sluit naadloos aan bij jullie focus op de volledige funnel, van tagging tot tracking.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Ants is de kans om te groeien onder senior mentors, met echte verantwoordelijkheid voor klanten. Ik wil niet alleen taken uitvoeren, maar strategisch meedenken. Jullie nadruk op data en resultaat motiveert me om elke dag beter te worden.

Ik ben leergierig, weerbaar en niet bang voor cijfers. Mijn Nederlands is B1 (ik volg lessen), en ik werk vloeiend in het Engels. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, dicht bij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel inzetbaar.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ants team,

When I read the vacancy for Digital Performance Marketer, it felt like you were describing me. You are looking for someone with initial experience in performance marketing, a data-native mindset, and a 'boots-in-the-dirt' attitude — that is me.

At Episto, I work daily on on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and WordPress management. I analyze performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console, and translate data into actions. My project mirook.com is a playground for technical SEO and GEO: I implemented JSON-LD schema, entity markup, and llms.txt to improve visibility in AI search engines. This aligns perfectly with your focus on the full funnel, from tagging to tracking.

What appeals to me at Ants is the opportunity to grow under senior mentors, with real responsibility for clients. I don't just want to execute tasks; I want to think strategically. Your emphasis on data and results motivates me to improve every day.

I am eager to learn, resilient, and not afraid of numbers. My Dutch is B1 (I take lessons), and I work fluently in English. I live in Zwijndrecht, close to Antwerp, and am flexible.

I look forward to discussing my motivation and experience further in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on SEO & GEO experience: on-page SEO, keyword research, structured data, entity optimization, and AI search visibility (GEO/AEO) via mirook.com
- Data-native: daily use of Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Ads to guide decisions
- WordPress & technical build: site building with Elementor/Astra, content management, and technical audits
- First experience in performance marketing at Episto, with ownership of client SEO and content
- Based in Zwijndrecht (near Antwerp), fluent English, B1 Dutch with ongoing lessons
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
